Name: PackName
Description: The name of the pack to load, as defined in the Drapo configuration

Name: SkipLocalCache
Description: When true, bypasses both the in-memory loaded check and the local cache, forcing a conditional request to the server using If-None-Match. On a 304 Not Modified response the cached pack is used; on a 200 the new content is downloaded and the cache is updated. Useful for reloading dynamic packs that may change at runtime.
